**Day 2:**

🤝 **Work with Perry:**

[http://workwithperry.com/](http://workwithperry.com/)

**📦 Julius’s Bigfoot Blueprint Directory Asset Pack:**  
 [http://bigfootblueprint.com/directoryassetpack](http://bigfootblueprint.com/directoryassetpack)

Get the assets, templates, and resources designed to help you build and launch your directory faster. Perfect for implementing the Bigfoot Blueprint framework and accelerating your progress. 👣🚀🔥

🤖 **Perry's Directory Mentor GPT:**

[https://chatgpt.com/g/g-6a202c6fd1308191b642d6043b934b6f-directory-mentor](https://chatgpt.com/g/g-6a202c6fd1308191b642d6043b934b6f-directory-mentor)

**Example prompt**: City Dump is a standalone brand and property \- It is a nationwide, database-driven directory of public waste disposal facilities across the United States: municipal dump sites, MSW landfills, transfer stations, recycling centers, household hazardous waste (HHW) drop- offs, and green waste sites. The strategic frame is identical to the rest of the portfolio: become the most useful, most complete, most search-optimized resource in a fragmented vertical where the current bar is a government webpage and a Google Maps pin. Municipal waste data is scattered across EPA databases, county websites, and Google Maps with no single destination that aggregates, enriches, and presents it in a useful format. That gap is the opportunity. Every page must be more useful than the county government page it will outrank. That is the publish standard.

🤖 **Directory Building AI Tools & Resources**

**0\. Perry's Directory Mentor GPT**  
 Use this GPT to brainstorm directory ideas, validate niches, develop monetization strategies, and accelerate implementation.  
 [https://chatgpt.com/g/g-6a202c6fd1308191b642d6043b934b6f-directory-mentor](https://chatgpt.com/g/g-6a202c6fd1308191b642d6043b934b6f-directory-mentor)

**1\. Directory Intelligence (Architect)**  
 Helping people build database-driven niche directories that rank on Google.  
 [https://gemini.google.com/gem/1M7ss0oGtjNtEBjnWoL0MbClImWzAgs2J?usp=sharing](https://gemini.google.com/gem/1M7ss0oGtjNtEBjnWoL0MbClImWzAgs2J?usp=sharing)

**2\. Apify Actor Builder (Engineer)**  
 Paste your directory schema and get a complete, ready-to-run Apify actor. This bot reads your field list and generates every file your data pipeline needs. No Apify experience required.

This bot turns a directory schema into working code. Give it the .md output from the Directory Intelligence Bot. It returns a full Apify actor with Google Places enrichment, OpenAI content generation, and anti-thin validation built in.  
 [https://gemini.google.com/gem/1KUnprWbda90QuFLX6wyv81FYfqEWo8PQ?usp=sharing](https://gemini.google.com/gem/1KUnprWbda90QuFLX6wyv81FYfqEWo8PQ?usp=sharing)

**Directorist Pro Plugin**  
 [https://drive.google.com/drive/folders/1mh93T\_rHEZL-3eu4SLKOabWA6oqg7Nol?usp=drive\_link](https://drive.google.com/drive/folders/1mh93T_rHEZL-3eu4SLKOabWA6oqg7Nol?usp=drive_link)

 [https://drive.google.com/drive/folders/1OzD6oC5hf67F4vwWqZbKPQImUNizZpi2?usp=drive\_link](https://drive.google.com/drive/folders/1OzD6oC5hf67F4vwWqZbKPQImUNizZpi2?usp=drive_link)

🤖 **Perry's Directory Data Scout GPT:**  
 [https://chatgpt.com/g/g-6a21d1b273d881919a33a5ccbec62a1d-directory-data-scout](https://chatgpt.com/g/g-6a21d1b273d881919a33a5ccbec62a1d-directory-data-scout)

Use this GPT to help research, collect, validate, and organize directory data for your niche. It's designed to assist with sourcing business listings, identifying data gaps, and preparing information for directory population and enrichment. 👣📊🚀🔥

**Perry’s Prompt:** I'm building a database right now of city dumps across America so that I can build a directory of them. I need a detailed list of every data resource available that I can use for this project. My objective will be selling leads to junk hauler companies.

Rapid API Hub: [https://rapidapi.com/hub](https://rapidapi.com/hub)

Open AI API Keys: [https://platform.openai.com/api-keys](https://platform.openai.com/api-keys)

Github Public APIs: [https://github.com/public-apis/public-apis](https://github.com/public-apis/public-apis)

[https://meterlinks.com/vibecoded-bfbp](https://meterlinks.com/vibecoded-bfbp)

📦 **Download the Pro-Bigfoot-Blueprint-Directories.zip File:**

[http://meterlinks.com/bfbp-website](http://meterlinks.com/bfbp-website)

2\. Go to Replit

3\. Import Code or Design

![][image2]

4\. Choose Import from a .zip file

![][image3]

5\. Click Import from zip and it will start to Import

![][image4]

6\. Once app is created successfully, click View App

![][image5]

**Download the Database:**

[https://drive.google.com/file/d/1IaWWSVeYWmXS\_tLQD4Pu2MyTwXdZpp\_o/view?usp=sharing](https://drive.google.com/file/d/1IaWWSVeYWmXS_tLQD4Pu2MyTwXdZpp_o/view?usp=sharing)

Add downloaded file to the Chat and ask it to: import this database

![][image6]

### **Extra Build Session** {#extra-build-session}

📄 **Russell's Bigfoot Blueprint Guide Doc:**

[https://meterlinks.com/vibecoded-bfbp](https://meterlinks.com/vibecoded-bfbp)

Perry’s Replit Prompt: I want to build a user friendly public, searchable public API directory from this: https://github.com/public-

apis/public-apis

Perry’s New API Site: [http://apidirectory.org](http://apidirectory.org)

[https://github.com/public-apis/public-apis/blob/master/CONTRIBUTING.md](https://github.com/public-apis/public-apis/blob/master/CONTRIBUTING.md)

[https://github.com/awesomedata/awesome-public-datasets](https://github.com/awesomedata/awesome-public-datasets)

**Perry’s Prompt in the Directory Mentor GPT:** I need three ideas for a directory that I can build with replit very quickly using only one public data source from here https://github.com/public-apis/public-apis a github repo or a a goverment feed

**Perry’s Replit SEO Prompt:** acting as a professional search engine optimization expert. I need you to go in and apply search engine optimization to this property head to toe. I need it to Raquelle and Google for every page and I needed to rank well for answer engine optimization in every page.

**Perry’s Prompt in Gemini for On-Demand Data Enrichment for FDA:** I'm thinking about creating a directory that would be a directory of all FDA recall products by brand. I can pull the feed from the FDA so the base information is there and we can add in commenting and reviews for user generated content. Here's what I'm wondering, can I build this in a way where if I use replit and an API key each time somebody searches a product and pulls it up it would go out and do a search to find all the updated information about that recall that product that brand, etc., and write news to that particular listing. And serve it to the client in real time. The cool part would be that once that was written, it would be part of the permanent record of that particular listing. wouldn't have to spend thousands of dollars updating thousands of listings unless somebody actually called on that listing what do you think of that idea?

### **Replit Express Lane** {#replit-express-lane}

1. Go to the [Bigfoot Blueprint Directories Link](https://replit.com/join/nolnopymizdpulo-trishaclaudine).   
2. Click Bigfoot Blueprint Directories at the top left corner.

![][image7]

3. Click Remix to **Remix** and rename it to your own preferred name  
4. After you’re done with Remixing, you can test your own Directory, by clicking Sign in at the top right and it will bring you to the sign in page 🙂 

**Default Credentials**

username: admin@admin.com

password: admin12345678

5. You can add your self (for testing and easy login) and others (teammates) as  user in the app.  
6. No need to publish until you’ve made all your directory changes & want to make the site Live to public. Publishing uses additional credits.

**Perry’s Higgsfield Prompt:** Make a full color hand drawn doodle type slide similar to the style of the attached slides and Perry's photo that illustrates this point:

I'm creating a prompt for an AI agent and I want to create slide images that look similar to these. Can you please give me a description that I can use in that prompt to make my slides look a lot like these just in style not the same content, I just want to duplicate the style. I need you to describe the style..
